alt: Sirocco standing upright, showing its charismatic personality and strong climbing legs
caption: Despite being completely flightless, the kakapo uses its powerful legs and claws to climb high into towering canopy trees.
acquisitionNotes: Curated fun-fact full length portrait of Sirocco. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/a/aa/Sirocco_full_length_portrait.jpg
